titleStmt.title: SII 28.294: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 294. (A.R. No. 448 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple, central shrine, east base.

p.note: As per L.D. Swamikannu Pillai (A.R. Ep. 1914 p. 65), the eclipse referred to could be the lunar one that occurred on September 9, 1280 A.D. f.d.t. ·38, the date conciding with the 13th year of Māṟavarman Kulaśēkhara (I). However as a lunar eclipse occurs only in the concluding phase of the full moon and when the eclipse ends in the first phase of the dark fortnight (prarthamā) and as per his own Indian Ephemeries) on September 10 it is very doubtful that the eclipse on September 10 was visible in these regions. However, as per his own Indian Ephemeris it would appear their only the concluding phase of the a lunar eclipse also occurred in the month of PuraṭṭAdi both in 1279 A.D. (September 21-full moon ·75) and in 1281 A.D. (August 30-fullmoon lasted till ·04 of August 31).

summary.p: This inscription records a royal order addressed to tiru-vaḍi-ppiḍikkumnambimār and śrī-vaishṇava-kkaṇkāṇi-chayvār of the temple of Kariya-perumāḷ in Āṟagaḷūr in Āṟṟūr-kkūṟṟam, intimating them that he had granted as tirunāmattukkāṇi-iṟai-ili (land granted tax-free, to be held directly by the God along with the entitlement to collect and enjoy the proceeds of the levies (āyam) poṉ-vari, kāśāyam, kāttikai-ppachchai, uśi-vāśi, mātru-śaṉti, nall-erudu, naṟ-paśu, vēli-erudu-kāṇikkaī, nāṭṭu-viṉiyōgam, āḷ-amañji-tēvai, 1000 kūḻi of first grade wetland in the vāra-ppaṟṟu under the reservoir in Poṉparappi alias Irāja-nārāyaṇanallūr for the food-offerings (amudu-paḍi) and decoration (chāttu-paḍi) of (the deity) Siṅgar in their temple, as propitiation in view of the eclipse in the month of Puraṭṭādi in the year 13 of the kings elder brother (aṇāḻvi) Sundara-pāṇḍiyadēvar (the text as it is, suggests that the year quoted was in the regnal reckoning of the elder brother rather than of the issuer of the record. It does not specify that the benefaction was for the merit of aṇṇāḻvi). The record was attested by Ādittaṉ Gaṇapati-āḻvāṉ alias Vāṇādarājan of Kappalūr alias Ulagaḷandachōḻanallūr in Muttu-kkūṟṟam in Pāṇḍi-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Aruḷicceyal Āṟṟūrk kūṟṟattu Āṟakaḷurk kariyaperumāḷ koyilil tiruvaṭippiṭikkum nampimārkkum śrīvaiṣṇavak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum Ikkoyil ciṅkarkku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa nitta nimantaṅkaḷukkum
(m) tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalāka Aṇṇāḻvi cuntarapāṇṭiya tevarkkup patiṉmuṉṟāvatu puraṭṭāti mātattil grahaṇa śāntyartthamākap poṉparappiyāṉa Irācanārāyaṇanallūr Eri kiḻvārappaṟṟu naṉcey nilattil mutaṟ tarattile taṭico Āyiraṅkuḻi po
ṉvari kācāyaṅ kāttikaippaccai Ūcivāci mātirucānti nallerutu naṟpacu veli Erutukāṇikkai nāṭṭuviṉiokam Āḷamañci tevai Uṭppaṭṭa Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭa Innāḷ mutal tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiiliyākat tantom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai
piṭipāṭākakkoṇṭu Innilattil nāṉkellaiyilum tiruvāḻik kallum nāṭṭik kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu candrādittavaraiyum tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiiliyāka Aṉupavikka Ippaṭikku Ivai pāṇṭimaṇṭalattu muttukkūṟṟattuk kappalūr Āṉa Ulakaḷa
nta coḻaṉallūr Ātittaṉ kaṇapati Āḻvāṉāṉa vāṇātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . tirueḻuttu tulyam .
Digital edition of SII 28.294 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
